title: chorizanthe polygonoides subsp. longispina
intro: Chorizanthe polygonoides subsp. longispina is a species of flowering plant in the buckwheat family, Polygonaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Chorizanthe polygonoides subsp. longispina can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in herbal supplements, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
